title: AI-assisted real-time hemodialysis monitoring
titleZh: AI 輔助即時血液透析監測
problem: Dialysis care is built around a four-hour treatment, but toxin removal and physiological risk can change long before summary measures are available.
problemZh: 透析治療歷時約四小時，但尿毒素清除與生理風險可能早在總結性指標出現前就已改變。
approach: A 255/275/310-nm optoelectronic system reads spent dialysate once per minute. Support-vector regression combines optical features with clinically relevant patient and treatment variables.
approachZh: 255／275／310 nm 光電系統每分鐘讀取透析廢液；支援向量迴歸結合光學特徵、病人與治療變項。
evidence: Across 30 sessions from nine ESRD patients, several toxin predictions reached R² values near 0.95; the work also exposes the practical challenge of machine artifacts and patient variation.
evidenceZh: 九位 ESRD 病人、30 次療程中，多項尿毒素預測 R² 接近 0.95；同時也正面處理機器干擾與個體差異。
next: Move from monitoring toward multicentre validation, explainable models, and intradialytic-hypotension support.
nextZh: 下一步是多中心驗證、可解釋模型與透析中低血壓決策支援。

title: Flexible e-skin for real-world physiological monitoring
titleZh: 面向真實生活生理監測的柔性電子皮膚
problem: Useful physiological sensing must work while a person—or an animal—moves, sweats, breathes, and lives outside the laboratory.
problemZh: 有用的生理感測必須在人或動物移動、流汗、呼吸與離開實驗室後仍能運作。
approach: The team connects origami and cellulose-based tactile sensing, conductive textiles, LIG/electrochemical interfaces, low-power electronics, and self-powered concepts.
approachZh: 團隊串聯摺紙與纖維素觸覺感測、導電紡織、LIG／電化學介面、低功耗電子與自供電概念。
evidence: Tactile devices have demonstrated pulse, posture, bruxism, and trigger-finger sensing, while current student work is extending wearable respiratory sensing to practical animal-study protocols.
evidenceZh: 觸覺裝置已展示脈搏、姿態、磨牙與扳機指感測；目前學生研究也正把呼吸感測延伸至實際動物試驗流程。
next: Build multimodal, washable, and field-ready e-skin systems with data pipelines that support long-term interpretation.
nextZh: 下一步是建立多模態、可清洗、可進入現場的電子皮膚系統，以及支援長期判讀的資料流程。

title: Pipette-operable microfluidic diagnostics
titleZh: 以移液器操作的微流體診斷平台
problem: Molecular diagnostics often depend on instruments, complicated liquid handling, and trained operators—barriers that matter most when testing must be fast and accessible.
problemZh: 分子診斷常依賴儀器、複雜液體操作與專業人員；而在需要快速且可近用檢測時，這些正是最大的門檻。
approach: A smart-tip device uses passive hydrophobic valves to fill and isolate multiple reaction chambers through controlled pipette operation, supporting lyophilised RT-LAMP workflows.
approachZh: Smart tip 以被動疏水閥透過受控移液操作填充並隔離多個反應腔，支援凍乾 RT-LAMP 流程。
evidence: The published platform demonstrated sequential liquid handling and multiplex detection concepts for SARS-CoV-2, Influenza A, and Influenza B targets.
evidenceZh: 已發表平台展示序列液體操作與 SARS-CoV-2、A 型與 B 型流感多重檢測概念。
next: Extend robust sample-to-answer handling toward clinically and agriculturally relevant molecular assays.
nextZh: 下一步是把可靠的 sample-to-answer 操作延伸至臨床與農業相關分子檢測。
